headline: Verify vault passkey unlock through the framework passkey surface
summary: Vault unlock now verifies the passkey assertion through the framework's passkey API rather than a direct WebAuthn-library import, with user verification required explicitly.

items.title: Route vault passkey unlock through b.auth.passkey
items.body: The passkey-gated vault unlock verified the assertion with a direct WebAuthn-library call; it now uses the framework's b.auth.passkey verification API — the same path the passkey login flow uses — and requires user verification explicitly. The verification semantics are unchanged (user verification was already the library default for this call).
